flavor: Lost Brothers gear — 300+ weapon spirit cards across chrome, Helix, pits, and the ash road.

items.name: Trail Jerky
items.blurb: Salted prairie beef. Chewy as a bad promise. Share with your dog to keep them in the fight.

items.name: Dust Poultice
items.blurb: Herb mash for whip welts and spider bites.

items.name: Frontier Revolver
items.blurb: Six chambers of dusty justice — fantasy powder and all.

items.name: Ranch Carbine
items.blurb: Short-barreled trail gun for saddles and ambushes.

items.name: Stock Whip
items.blurb: Once used on captives. Now aimed at the overseers.

items.name: Iron Hatchet
items.blurb: Camp tool, throat tool — same edge.

items.name: Hide Duster
items.blurb: Long coat that eats wind and glancing blades.

items.name: Sun-Bleached Hat
items.blurb: Wide brim; keeps the ash-glare out of your eyes.

items.name: Work Gloves
items.blurb: Leather cracked by rope and rain.

items.name: Spur Boots
items.blurb: Heels that meant ownership. You'll rewrite that.

items.name: Plank Shield
items.blurb: Barn wood strapped to an arm.

items.name: Copper Spur Charm
items.blurb: A keepsake cut from a jailer's heel.

items.name: Orc Cleaver
items.blurb: Serrated and unsubtle — Thorn-Clan work.

items.name: Ashwood Spear
items.blurb: Long reach for wargs and riders.

items.name: Yew Shortbow
items.blurb: Quiet as hope on the pine road.

items.name: Wilderland Jerkin
items.blurb: Soft hide of the northern scrub.

items.name: Ironwood Buckler
items.blurb: Round shield with a wolf-brand burned in.

items.name: Broken Chain Scarf
items.blurb: Links filed open and worn as pride.

items.name: Moonsteel Saber
items.blurb: A curve of pale steel that sings in cold mist.

items.name: Ashwood Longbow
items.blurb: Drawn like a prayer across the ridge wind.

items.name: Ember Ridge Staff
items.blurb: Banked coal in the heartwood.

items.name: Warg-Fang Charm
items.blurb: A tooth from the Night-Howler pack.

items.name: Ringmail Vest
items.blurb: Rings quiet enough for a gunfighter's crawl.

items.name: Mist Striders
items.blurb: Boots that leave no print in wet ash.

items.name: Widow-Silk Cloak
items.blurb: Harvested from the Silk Queen's empty nests.

items.name: Bridge-Stone Mail
items.blurb: Plates chipped from the Arch Toll-Troll's lair.

items.name: Greater Poultice
items.blurb: Mender's mash laced with ridge blossom.

items.name: Hearth Mana Cider
items.blurb: Warm cider that wakes ley-spark.

items.name: Bone-Drum Cleaver
items.blurb: Forged to the beat of Thorn-Clan war drums.

items.name: Ash-Veil Revolver
items.blurb: Chambers that smoke pale after every shot.

items.name: Pale-Host Helm
items.blurb: Visor like a winter moon — dread sits light.

items.name: Liberation Gauntlets
items.blurb: Knuckles etched with broken-shackle runes.

items.name: Ridge-Scale Greaves
items.blurb: Scales claimed from a high-pass wyrmling.

items.name: Liberator's Spur
items.blurb: A golden spur that opens every lock it touches.

items.name: Broken-Shackle Crown
items.blurb: Manacle links reforged into a circlet of free wills.

items.name: Wilderland Oathblade
items.blurb: Steel sworn to every name you free along the road.

items.name: Neon Switchblade
items.blurb: Folds quiet; unfolds bright and mean.

items.name: Fiber-Oak Bat
items.blurb: Biolume sap still sticky on the grain.

items.name: Stim Needle Gun
items.blurb: Shoots courage, debt, or both.

items.name: Barcode Razor
items.blurb: Cuts SKUs and throats with equal boredom.

items.name: Coolant Harpoon
items.blurb: River freight persuasion device.

items.name: Helix Smile Baton
items.blurb: Gate cops grin while they break ribs.

items.name: Spirit Jar Sling
items.blurb: Throws captive ghosts like grenades.

items.name: Seal Ring Knuckles
items.blurb: Numbers carved into your punch.

items.name: Undervault Shiv
items.blurb: Betting-pit etiquette in steel form.

items.name: Synth Mandolin Axe
items.blurb: Keeps time; takes heads.

items.name: Pit Chrome Gauntlet
items.blurb: One punch, then the crowd decides.

items.name: Spire Rail Spike
items.blurb: Tower scrap turned into a bad idea that works.

items.name: Gridfire Machete
items.blurb: Still warm from a burning server farm.

items.name: Ash Horizon Rifle
items.blurb: Shoots west until the name comes back.

items.name: Memory Shade Dagger
items.blurb: Looks like your brother's knife. Isn't.

items.name: Pale Harvest Scythe
items.blurb: Project Pale's garden tool.

items.name: Brother Bond Blade
items.blurb: Three names on one edge.

items.name: Neon Wilderland Bow
items.blurb: String of fiber-optic sinew.

items.name: Helix Director Cane
items.blurb: Vale smiled when she swung it.

items.name: Free Horizon Revolver
items.blurb: Last chamber saved for the road home.

items.name: Fiber Ridge Cleaver
items.blurb: Helix stamp half-filed off the grip.

items.name: Stim Ridge Saber
items.blurb: Still warm from somebody else's fight.

items.name: Barcode Road Knife
items.blurb: Whispers when you chamber a name.

items.name: Coolant Road Shiv
items.blurb: Forged under neon, quenched in coolant.

items.name: Helix Road Axe
items.blurb: A freehold heirloom that learned to bite.

items.name: Spirit Vault Hatchet
items.blurb: Counts scars the way clerks count SKUs.

items.name: Seal Vault Spear
items.blurb: Too pretty for the pits — used there anyway.

items.name: Pit Vault Pike
items.blurb: Dog-tooth notches on the handle.

items.name: Spire Forge Staff
items.blurb: Project Pale leftover that kept its edge.

items.name: Grid Forge Cane
items.blurb: Road dust baked into the metal.

items.name: Ash Forge Baton
items.blurb: Sings like a mandolin when it hits bone.

items.name: Pale March Knuckles
items.blurb: Smells like burnt stim and old rain.

items.name: Chrome March Whip
items.blurb: Helix stamp half-filed off the grip.

items.name: Widow March Scythe
items.blurb: Still warm from somebody else's fight.

items.blurb: Whispers when you chamber a name.

items.name: Trace Fen Machete
items.blurb: Forged under neon, quenched in coolant.

items.name: Mire Fen Revolver
items.blurb: A freehold heirloom that learned to bite.

items.blurb: Counts scars the way clerks count SKUs.

items.name: Cade Oak Rifle
items.blurb: Too pretty for the pits — used there anyway.

items.name: Bone Oak Pistol
items.blurb: Dog-tooth notches on the handle.

items.name: Iron Coil Sling
